title: Scope MCP permissions per-server (channelPermissions relay)
description: CC (channelPermissions.ts:1-240) implements a permission-relay system that races permission dialogs against channel servers (Telegram, iMessage, Discord) that emit notifications/claude/channel/permission events. Servers opt in via capabilities.experimental['claude/channel/permission']. OC has no permission relay subsystem. Required: subscribe to channel-server notifications, match request_id, resolve pending permission dialogs from channel replies.
